channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police report mutual complaints after Quezon City road rage dispute
item.description: In Quezon City, authorities have confirmed that both parties involved in a recent road rage incident have filed complaints against each other. The incident reportedly involved a bus and a motorcycle, ...

item.title: Pakistan Armed Forces Reaffirm Readiness and Strength on Marka-i-Haq Anniversary
item.description: On the first anniversary of the 2025 conflict with India, dubbed 'Marka-i-Haq' by the state, Pakistan's Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) reaffirmed that any hostile design against the country wi...

item.title: Guide to Welsh Parliament 2026 Election: Party Policies and Key Issues
item.description: On 7 May 2026, Wales will hold elections for the Senedd Cymru, the Welsh Parliament, which will expand from 60 to 96 seats. The BBC has prepared a comprehensive guide to help voters understand the pol...

item.title: India's Table Tennis Teams Exit Early at World Championships
item.description: India’s participation at the 2026 World Table Tennis Team Championships concluded on a disappointing note with both men’s and women’s teams exiting in the round of 32. The women’s team faced the Unite...

item.title: APC Clears President Tinubu From Screening Ahead Of 2027 Primaries
item.description: Di All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially waive di screening requirement for President Bola Ahmed Tinubu. Dis one mean say President Tinubu fit participate for di party's 2027 presidential pri...

item.title: Migrant Workers Face Systemic Exploitation in Australia: Findings from a 10,000-Person Survey
item.description: A comprehensive survey of nearly 10,000 temporary visa holders in Australia, conducted by the Migrant Justice Institute, reveals that workplace exploitation is widespread rather than isolated. The stu...

item.title: Proposed CGT reforms may significantly impact start-up ownership and investment
item.description: Recent discussions around potential changes to Australia's capital gains tax (CGT) could have far-reaching effects on start-ups and private capital investment. The government is reportedly considering...

item.title: Bangladesh Seeks Calm Over Possible Immigration Issues Following Assam and Bengal Poll Results
item.description: Dhaka has expressed hope that recent election victories of the BJP in Assam and West Bengal will not lead to an increase in forced returns, or 'pushbacks', of suspected illegal immigrants from India i...

item.title: Sinitta opens up about spirituality, love, and personal changes at 62
item.description: Sinitta, the British popstar who rose to fame in the 1980s, has shared insights into her personal life in a candid interview with Closer magazine. At 62, she has become a pastor, attributing her spiri...

item.title: Activists obstruct Russian pavilion at Venice Biennale amid Ukraine conflict
item.description: During the first Venice Biennale since Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine in 2022, protesters disrupted the exhibition at the Russian pavilion. Russian punk collective Pussy Riot and members of U...

item.title: Understanding Kenya’s New Universal PIN and Its Impact on Informal Workers
item.description: Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) has officially ended the era of nil tax returns, requiring every adult Kenyan to have a Personal Identification Number (PIN) regardless of income or occupation. This move...

item.title: Pakistan’s Diplomatic and Economic Challenges Amid Recent Successes
item.description: Over the past year, Pakistan has achieved notable successes on the diplomatic and defence fronts, including a strong showing in the May war against India and progress towards a historic US-Iran peace ...

item.title: Detailed 2026 Fee Structure and Admission Process for Moi High School Kabarak
item.description: Moi High School Kabarak, located in Nakuru County, is one of Kenya’s top-performing private secondary schools, known for strong academics and active co-curricular programmes. For 2026, annual fees ran...

item.title: CBI busts organised network trafficking Indians to Southeast Asia under false job offers
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has carried out searches at nine locations across four Indian states as part of a probe into a trafficking network that lures Indian nationals with fake overs...

item.title: Kolkata Police Bans Earthmover Rallies Amid Post-Poll Violence
item.description: Following the announcement of the West Bengal assembly election results, post-poll clashes erupted in multiple areas across the state starting Monday. In response, Kolkata Police on Wednesday announce...

item.title: Step-by-step guide to paying DStv subscription via M-Pesa in Kenya
item.description: Paying for DStv in Kenya has become very convenient thanks to M-Pesa, which allows users to settle their subscription quickly without visiting any physical shop. According to the guide, the most commo...

item.title: Proposed increases to JobSeeker could ease cost-of-living pressures for Australians
item.description: As Australia faces rising inflation and interest rates, cost-of-living pressures hit working-age welfare recipients the hardest. The Economic Inclusion Advisory Committee has repeatedly recommended a ...

item.title: OHL fines Barrie Colts $15,000 for unprofessional conduct in post-game press conference
item.description: After securing a Game 7 victory to eliminate the Brantford Bulldogs and advance to the Ontario Hockey League championship, the Barrie Colts faced controversy over their post-game press conference. Coa...

item.title: Kenneth Okonkwo Claps Back At Senate President Over ADC Comment
item.description: Nollywood actor and prominent ADC member, Kenneth Okonkwo, don reply Senate President Godswill Akpabio after the man talk say the African Democratic Congress (ADC) don finish. Akpabio yan this during ...

item.title: Police say Gatineau apartment fire linked to suspected murder-suicide
item.description: Police in Gatineau, Quebec, have confirmed that a fatal apartment fire was the result of a suspected murder-suicide. Emergency crews responded to the blaze at a residential building, where they discov...
